title: mimulus glabratus var. externus
intro: Mimulus glabratus var. externus is a variety of the smooth monkey flower plant, which is native to North America and is known for its vibrant purple or pink flowers. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and other stress-related disorders, due to its sedative and antispasmodic effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Mimulus glabratus var. externus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
